category_sources: Official PHP manual at https://www.php.net/manual/en/install.pie.intro.php describes PIE as an installer for PHP extensions.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/php/pie uses the display name PIE.
source_facts.description expands the uppercase acronym PIE.
docs_sources: Official PHP manual page documents PIE at https://www.php.net/manual/en/install.pie.intro.php.
Official repository README at https://github.com/php/pie is a secondary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/php/pie, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official PHP manual at https://www.php.net/manual/en/install.pie.intro.php says PIE installs third-party PHP extensions.
source_facts.description identifies PIE as the PHP Installer for Extensions.
